carousel.description: Managing your movie library and AI interactions has never been easier.

toast.unauthorized: Account does not have permission to access the admin page.
toast.error: An authentication error occurred. Please log in again.

errors.google_unknown: An unknown error occurred during authentication.
errors.SYS_201: This Google account does not have permission to access the system.
errors.SYS_500: The system is experiencing technical difficulties, please try again later.
errors.USR_320: Your account has been canceled from the system.
errors.USR_330: Your account is currently temporarily locked.
errors.ACCOUNT_DELETED: Your account has been deleted from the system.
errors.ACCOUNT_DISABLED: Your account is currently temporarily locked.

text.contact_admin_hint: If you believe this is an error, please contact the admin.
